info.title: Malawi Financial Intelligence API
info.description: REST API for the Malawi Financial Intelligence platform. 20 endpoints covering equities, fixed income, FX, macro, commodities (17 tracked), tobacco intelligence (AHL + TIMB + USDA), real estate yields, and the cross-asset yield comparison matrix. Tier-based access: Free / Professional / Institutional / Enterprise. MCP equivalent tools documented in MCP.md.

tags.name: Snapshot
tags.description: KPI strip — latest values across all indicators

tags.name: Equities
tags.description: MSE stock prices, valuations, and liquidity

tags.name: Yields
tags.description: Government securities yield curve and TB auctions

tags.name: Rates
tags.description: Interest rates and real rate calculations

tags.name: Macro
tags.description: Macroeconomic indicators — inflation, GDP, fiscal, reserves

tags.name: Commodities
tags.description: Maize prices (national + regional) and oil price

tags.name: Trade
tags.description: Trade balance — exports, imports, commodity breakdown

tags.name: Indices
tags.description: MASI, DSI, and FSI YTD return divergence

tags.name: Forecasts
tags.description: Per-institution macro projections — GDP, CPI, FX

tags.name: RealEstate
tags.description: Real estate rental prices, implied yields, and cross-asset yield comparison

get.description: Returns the most recent week's complete indicator snapshot used to populate the dashboard KPI strip. Equivalent to MCP `GetLatestSnapshot`.

All 16 MSE-listed equities with closing price, month-on-month change, P/E ratio, P/BV ratio, dividend yield, market cap, sector, liquidity rating, and valuation flags. Equivalent to MCP `GetStockHistory` + `GetValuationMetrics`. Monthly turnover (MK value traded and trade count) available via the `include_turnover` parameter.

parameters.name: include_turnover
parameters.description: Include monthly market turnover summary in response

get.summary: Government securities yield curve and TB auctions
get.description: Full 8-point yield curve (91-day TB through 10-year TN) with current yield, prior month, and basis point delta. Optionally includes Treasury Bill auction data (applied, awarded, acceptance rate). Equivalent to MCP `GetYieldCurveSnapshot` + `GetAuctionHistory`.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Week ending date for the yield curve snapshot (yyyy-MM-dd). Defaults to latest available.

parameters.name: compare
parameters.description: Second date to compare against (yyyy-MM-dd). Returns both curves side-by-side with basis point differences.

parameters.name: include_auctions
parameters.description: Include TB auction history in response

200.description: Yield curve snapshot with optional auction data

get.description: Middle (TT) opening exchange rates for MK/USD, MK/GBP, MK/EUR, MK/ZAR with buy/sell spread, month-on-month and year-on-year percentage changes, and trend classification. Equivalent to MCP `QueryIndicators` filtered to exchange_rate category.

All interest rates — MPR, Lombard, commercial bank reference, overnight interbank, TB yields, and the real rate (364-day TB minus Headline CPI). Includes basis point delta, budget targets, gap to target, and easing/tightening/stable status. Equivalent to MCP `ComputeRealRate` + `QueryIndicators`.

Latest available readings for CPI components, GDP growth, fiscal deficit, current account balance, FX reserves, and commodity prices (maize, oil). Includes reference period, MoM delta, and direction classification.

Prices and values for all 14 tracked commodities across five categories: food (maize 4 variants, NFRA price, fertiliser), energy (OPEC oil, diesel imports, petrol imports, domestic fuel price), minerals (uranium, graphite, rutile), agro-processing (tobacco, soybeans, groundnuts, macadamia), and trade flows. Pending commodities return null values with status='pending' and source details. Equivalent to MCP `GetCommodityPrices`.

parameters.name: commodity
parameters.description: Specific commodity key, category name, or 'all'

parameters.name: include_pending
parameters.description: Include commodities with no data yet (status=pending)

commodities.note: Below NFRA farmgate min of MK1,050/kg
First export Q2 2026 — target 200,000 lbs/month. USD53mn capital raised Feb 2026.

get.description: Sector-level banking health indicators extracted from the monthly economic report: return on equity, return on assets, non-performing loan ratio, and government securities exposure level. Context for interpreting elevated P/E multiples in the banking sector. Equivalent to MCP `GetBankingSectorMetrics`.

example.note: Highest ROE in region. Heavy govt securities exposure crowding private sector lending.

get.description: Monthly trade balance data: total exports, total imports, trade deficit, export-to-import ratio, and top commodity categories for both exports and imports. Equivalent to MCP `GetTradeBalance`.

get.summary: MASI, DSI, and FSI YTD returns
get.description: Monthly year-to-date returns for all three MSE indices (Malawi All Share Index, Domestic Share Index, Financial Sector Index) with divergence spreads. Equivalent to MCP `GetIndexDivergence`.

GDP, CPI, and FX projections from EIU, World Bank, Oxford Economics, and Government (SONA/Budget) — stored per-institution so consumers can analyse disagreements across sources. Equivalent to MCP `GetInstitutionalForecasts`.

Annual export structure data and structural benchmarks from World Bank special topic analysis. Tracks decline in export value, product diversity, market reach, exporter count, and survival rates from 2003 to 2024. Equivalent to MCP `GetExportStructure`.

parameters.name: metric
parameters.description: Filter to specific metric or return all

get.summary: TB and TN auction history with avg yields and liquidity
get.description: Monthly TB and Treasury Notes auction data including applied, awarded, rejection rates, average weighted yields, system liquidity, and total raised. Includes both weekly-sourced TB data and monthly-sourced TN data. Equivalent to MCP `GetAuctionHistory`.

parameters.name: rejections_only
parameters.description: Return only periods with full or high rejection rates

get.description: Weekly trading volume split by stock, extracted from the bar charts in each weekly report. Enables concentration analysis — what % of total MSE volume did the top stocks account for, and did concentration change after events. Equivalent to MCP `GetWeeklyStockVolume`.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Filter to one stock or return all

get.description: TB auction applications and awards broken down by tenor (91-day, 182-day, 364-day) with each tenor's share of total applications. The duration preference shift — 91-day collapsing from 22.7% to 5.8% while 182-day surged from 16.1% to 40.1% between 6 Feb and 20 Feb — is a leading indicator of market rate expectations.

Returns the last known observation date and publication lag for each indicator. Critical for FX reserves (3-month lag — Dec/Jan/Feb show N/A in source reports) and CPI (Jan 2026 only available in weekly body text, not appendix table).

example.notes: Dec/Jan/Feb show N/A in Appendix 1 — publication lag from RBM
Jan 2026 value in weekly body text only, not appendix table

get.description: Event-driven milestone records for pre-revenue mineral projects (Kayelekera uranium, Kasiya graphite/rutile). Includes capital raises, offtake MOUs, first-export targets, and regulatory events. Equivalent to MCP `GetMineralMilestones`.

example.description: Raised USD53mn via 35.4mn new shares at AUD2.15 to fund Kayelekera operational ramp-up. Infrastructure: sulphuric acid plant + national grid connection.
Non-binding offtake MOU with Traxys North America. Initial 40,000 MT/yr graphite concentrate (rising to 80,000 MT/yr). 6% commission.

get.summary: Tobacco intelligence layer — AHL, TIMB, USDA
get.description: Three-layer tobacco intelligence: AHL Malawi weekly auction results (season only, April–September), Zimbabwe TIMB reference price (leading indicator via shared buyer pool), and USDA FAS annual global supply/demand balance. Equivalent to MCP GetTobaccoAuction + GetTobaccoOutlook. TIMB prices flue-cured Virginia; AHL prices burley — correlated but not identical. TIMB in March–April is a leading indicator for AHL prices when Lilongwe floors open. Institutional+ tier required.

season.outlook: TIMB prices soft entering season — below the USD2.34 recorded at same point in 2025.

equity_linkages.note: Tobacco value chain interests via subsidiaries
Strong season → rural income → consumer spending on ILLOVO products

get.summary: Rental prices and implied yields by property type and city
get.description: Commercial (office Grade A/B, retail, warehouse) and residential (2-bed, 3-bed, 4-bed executive) rental prices in Blantyre and Lilongwe with implied annual yields. Most commercial leases in Malawi are USD-denominated; residential rents quoted in MK. Includes source quality flag (actual / listed / estimated). Equivalent to MCP GetRealEstatePrices. Institutional+ tier required.

The flagship analytical endpoint. Unified yield comparison across all trackable Malawi asset classes: government securities (all 8 tenors), listed equity earnings yields, real estate rental yields (commercial and residential), and the real rate. Enables allocation decisions that no other Malawi platform supports. Equivalent to MCP GetCrossAssetYieldMatrix. Institutional+ tier required.

parameters.name: adjust_currency
parameters.description: Convert USD property yields to MK-adjusted using EIU MK/USD forecast

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Api-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key issued per client. Include on every request.

To.name: to
To.description: End date filter (yyyy-MM-dd). Defaults to latest available.

Forbidden.description: Valid API key but insufficient subscription tier for this endpoint

Snapshot.description: Latest weekly market snapshot for dashboard KPI strip

Equity.description: MSE listed equity with price, valuation, and classification data

liquidity.description: high = large cap actively traded, thin = illiquid — % moves may not be repeatable

month.description: yyyy-MM for monthly, week date for weekly

avg_yield_pct.description: Weighted average yield of awarded bids. NULL if full rejection.

system_liquidity_mk_bn.description: System-wide market liquidity at month end. TB monthly only.

total_raised_mk_bn.description: Combined TB + TN total raised. Monthly summary only.

pct_of_total_applications.description: This tenor's share of total weekly/monthly applications. NULL for summary rows.

status.description: easing = delta < −50bps, tightening = delta > +50bps, negative = real rate below zero

direction.description: Context-aware: falling CPI = improving, falling GDP = deteriorating

farmgate_min.description: Government farmgate minimum price. Current price below this is a policy stress signal.

BankingMetrics.description: Sector-level banking health indicators from monthly economic reports

roe_pct.description: Return on equity. MSE banking sector among highest in Sub-Saharan Africa.

govt_sec_exposure.description: Level of banking sector exposure to government securities. High = crowding out private lending.

TradeBalance.description: Monthly trade balance data parsed from NSO releases in monthly economic reports

export_import_ratio.description: Exports as a fraction of imports. 0.18 = exports cover 18% of imports.

IndexReturn.description: Monthly YTD returns for MSE indices with divergence spreads

masi_ytd.description: Malawi All Share Index year-to-date return %

fsi_masi_spread.description: FSI minus MASI. Negative = financials underperforming. Peaked at +243pp in Nov 2025.

WeeklyStockVolume.description: Per-stock weekly trading volume from MSE weekly report bar charts

value_mk_mn.description: Value of shares traded in MK millions

pct_of_weekly_total.description: Share of total MSE weekly volume. STANDARD = 44.3% on 6 Feb week.

rank.description: Volume rank within the week (1 = highest)

TenorAuctionRecord.description: Per-tenor TB auction data — enables duration preference analysis

pct_of_total.description: This tenor's share of total week's applications. The key signal: 182-day surged from 16.1% to 40.1% between 6 Feb and 20 Feb.

DataFreshness.description: Staleness metadata for each tracked indicator

lag_months.description: Months between last known data and report date

notes.example: Dec/Jan/Feb show N/A in Appendix 1 — publication lag from RBM

CommodityRecord.description: Single commodity price or value record

value.description: Price or import/export value. NULL = pending data pipeline

status.description: live = data flowing; pending = source identified, ingestion not yet active

note.example: Below NFRA farmgate min of MK1,050/kg

MineralMilestone.description: Development milestone for a pre-revenue mineral project

value_usd_mn.description: Capital raise or project value where applicable

TobaccoAHLRecord.description: AHL Malawi weekly auction result (season only)

TobaccoTIMBRecord.description: Zimbabwe TIMB weekly reference price — leading indicator for AHL

flue_cured_pct.description: FCV share of weekly volume. TIMB is predominantly FCV; AHL is burley.

basis_spread.description: AHL avg minus TIMB avg — populated when both markets active simultaneously

TobaccoGlobalBalance.description: USDA FAS annual global tobacco supply/demand balance

RealEstateRecord.description: Rental price and implied yield for a property type and city

risk.description: sovereign | sovereign_duration | equity_liquid | equity_illiquid | property_vacancy | property_residential | inflation
